label_verbatim: A.1: Date of first use anywhere
rationale: Date the mark was first used anywhere (per applicant's knowledge and belief).

label_verbatim: A.2: Date of first use in Maine by applicant or predecessor in business
rationale: Date the mark was first used in Maine. May be earlier than 'anywhere' if predecessor used it.

label_verbatim: If predecessor, list name and address under which mark was last used
rationale: Predecessor-in-business name and address when first-use-in-Maine was by a predecessor.

label_verbatim: B.1: TEXT - list word(s) to be protected, if any (line 1)
rationale: First line of the word(s) of the mark to be registered.
Second line of the word(s) of the mark.

label_verbatim: B.2: FEATURES - describe in detail the design to be protected, if any (line 1)
rationale: First line of design-features description (used for marks that include logos or stylized designs).

label_verbatim: C: TYPE OF MARK and CLASS NUMBER
rationale: Combined type-of-mark (trademark/service mark/collective mark) and class number per Mark-5 (Class Numbers for Marks). Class number determines fee tier ($60 first class + $10 each additional).

label_verbatim: D: DESCRIBE goods manufactured or sold and/or the service that is provided (line 1)
rationale: First line of the goods/services description.
Second line of the goods/services description.

label_verbatim: DESCRIBE manner in which mark is applied to the goods or used to promote their sale and/or the manner in which the mark is used in connection with the service (line 1)
rationale: First line describing how the mark is used (e.g., 'printed on the label of bottles', 'displayed on the storefront sign').
Second line of the usage description.
Boolean opt-in indicating additional pages are attached.

label_verbatim: E: I, ___ (Print/Type Name and Capacity), believe
rationale: Signer's printed name and capacity (e.g., 'Jane Doe, President'). Capacity indicates 'Myself' for individual applicant or an officer-title for entity applicant.

label_verbatim: E: ___ (Myself, Firm, Association or Corporate Name)
rationale: Applicant identity as it appears on the mark — 'Myself' for individual, or the firm/association/corporate name when applicant is an entity.

label_verbatim: E: ___ (Mailing Address, City, State and Zip Code)
F: If a corporation, limited liability company or limited liability partnership, the jurisdiction (state) of incorporation/organization is
rationale: Home jurisdiction; required when entity_type implies a filing entity (corporation, LP, LLP, or 'other' that is a registered entity).

label_verbatim: F: ...and the date of incorporation/organization in its jurisdiction is
rationale: Date applicant entity was organized in its home jurisdiction.
Date of the mark-registration application (matches the universal filing.date_signed key from cover-letter primitive).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($60 first class + $10 each additional class per page 0 header, plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — note: trademark registrations don't have annual reports, but the cover letter is shared across SOS divisions. Field may be left blank for mark filings.
